name: Fenix NEO
summary: A convection dry-herb portable with a ceramic mouthpiece and wide temperature range, for patients who want cool, clean vapour and long battery life.
description: The Fenix NEO is a convection vaporiser that focuses on smooth, cool draws. A ceramic mouthpiece and the brand's convection heating produce clean vapour, and the temperature range starts low at 120C and runs up to 210C — useful if you want gentle, flavour-led dosing as well as denser sessions. The 4400mAh battery lasts well, with USB-C charging and a roughly 30-second heat-up. For a UK patient who wants convection flavour and a low starting temperature for lighter dosing, the NEO is a comfortable, dependable device.
